title: Emergency Numbers
description: Essential emergency contact numbers in Belgium.

items.name: General Emergency (EU-wide)
items.description: Toll-free from any phone, anywhere in the EU. Press 1 for ambulance/fire, press 2 for police.

items.name: Police (direct)
items.description: Direct line for urgent police assistance.

items.name: Ambulance & Fire Brigade (legacy)
items.description: Older number for ambulance and fire brigade, still active alongside 112.

items.name: Fire Brigade Non-Urgent (Storm Line)
items.description: Only active during storms/severe weather for non-life-threatening fire brigade assistance.

items.name: On-Call Doctor
items.description: Non-emergency on-call doctor service outside regular practice hours.

items.name: Poison Control Centre
items.description: Belgian Poison Control Centre for poisoning emergencies.

items.name: Card Stop (lost/stolen bank cards)
items.description: Block a lost or stolen Belgian bank card.

items.name: Child Focus (missing children)
items.description: Hotline for missing and sexually exploited children.
